project_type: Python desktop application (PySide6 GUI + Typer CLI) for Salesforce Translation Workbench STF workflow
test_framework: pytest with conftest.py fixtures, pytest-qt for GUI tests. Tests in tests/ directory.
verification_instructions: Run 'pytest -q' from the repo root. All tests must pass (currently 219). New features must include tests.
setup_instructions: pip install -e '.[gui,dev]' from the repo root
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Python 3.11 default. PySide6 available for GUI tests (offscreen via QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen in conftest.py).
contribution_requirements: Tests required for new features. Code follows ruff linting. Dataclasses used extensively. Frozen Entry dataclass pattern. Runner uses ThreadPoolExecutor for concurrency.
key_patterns: Frozen dataclass Entry(key, label, translation, approved) in model.py
Document dataclass with entries list in model.py
TranslationMemory is SQLite-backed in memory.py with WAL journal mode
Runner in translate/runner.py uses _classify/_translate_one pattern, fills _new_entries and _statuses arrays
GUI state is AppState dataclass in gui/state.py - pages mutate it directly
Settings persisted via QSettings in gui/settings.py (SettingsKeys dataclass for key names)
Workers in gui/workers.py wrap core functions in QThread with finished_ok/failed signals
UndoStack in gui/undo.py - QObject-based with push/undo/redo/clear + stack_changed signal
CLI uses Typer with rich Progress for translation progress display
relevant_files: src/stx/translate/runner.py - translation runner that needs checkpoint/resume support
src/stx/memory.py - TranslationMemory (SQLite-backed) - pattern for new checkpoint store
src/stx/gui/state.py - AppState that holds all GUI run-state
src/stx/gui/pages/phase3_translate.py - Phase 3 page that launches translation
directory_structure: src/stx/ (core library), src/stx/gui/ (PySide6 GUI), src/stx/gui/pages/ (one module per phase), src/stx/translate/ (backends + runner), tests/ (pytest suite)
